category_sources: source_facts.description says minimal CLI coding agent; official Mistral docs describe Mistral Vibe as a terminal-native coding agent.
display_name_sources: Official Mistral docs and official GitHub repository use the display name Mistral Vibe.
docs_sources: Official Mistral Docs contain the Mistral Vibe overview and quickstart pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub project; official Mistral docs identify Mistral Vibe as open-source and link to that project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says CLI coding agent; official docs describe code generation, terminal workflow, agents, and IDE integration.
